title: [ExportVerilog] Legalize field names of struct types
body:
This commit adds `FieldNameResolver` class to legalize field names in
struct types. Field names may contain verilog reserved keywrods so it's
necessary to rename them before the emission. I implemented it as a sub
component of `GlobalNameResolver` and replace all types with legalized
types.

For example, the type with reserved keyword "repeat"
```mlir
hw.module @renameKeyword(%a: !hw.struct<repeat: i1>) -> (r1: !hw.struct<repeat: i1>){
  hw.output %a : !hw.struct<repeat: i1>
}
```
will be converted into
```mlir
hw.module @renameKeyword(%a: !hw.struct<repeat_0: i1>) -> (r1: !hw.struct<repeat_0: i1>) {
  hw.output %a : !hw.struct<repeat_0: i1>
}
``` 

will close https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/2326
